blockers.description: Phase 4 has no CONTEXT.md; plan-phase cannot nest AskUserQuestion into /gsd:discuss-phase (upstream bug #1009).
blockers.workaround: Run /gsd:discuss-phase 4 as a top-level command, then /gsd:plan-phase 4.

human_actions_pending.action: /clear then run /gsd:discuss-phase 4 to capture Paddle/tier design decisions
human_actions_pending.context: Paddle integrations lock irreversible choices (price IDs, webhook secret, trial-end behavior, tax/VAT, cancel/pause UX, grace periods). Planner quality depends on CONTEXT.md being present before spawn.

human_actions_pending.action: Decide whether app/scripts/dev-session.mjs should be committed or kept local
human_actions_pending.context: Dev-only helper that upserts a verified pro/admin user and prints an iron-session cookie. Reads .env, uses installed argon2+iron-session. Not gated on NODE_ENV — add a guard if committing.

decisions.decision: Phase 4 is the next unplanned phase (phase 3 already has 4 plans + context/research/validation)
decisions.rationale: ls .planning/phases/03-google-oauth/ shows 4 PLAN.md files; roadmap marks phase 2 as [x], phases 1,3,4,5 as [ ]; memory note says phase 3 is 'ready' (planned, not executed).

decisions.decision: User chose 'Run discuss-phase first (Recommended)' over 'Continue without context'
decisions.rationale: Explicit user answer in AskUserQuestion during plan-phase step 4.

decisions.decision: Use docker compose up -d mongo (documented dev path) instead of switching MONGO_URI to memory://
decisions.rationale: User said 'run it whatever, open the local db'. docker-compose.yml is the documented persistence path; memory mode requires a dev-server restart and loses data on reload.

decisions.decision: Seed a pro/admin verified user via iron-session cookie forging instead of curling Next server actions
decisions.rationale: Next server actions require the runtime-hashed Next-Action header which is not stable across builds. Direct iron-session seal + mongo upsert is deterministic, uses existing packages, and takes one file.

next_action: /clear, then run /gsd:discuss-phase 4 to capture Paddle billing decisions. After it writes 04-CONTEXT.md, re-run /gsd:plan-phase 4 to spawn researcher -> planner -> checker.
context_notes: User invoked /gsd:plan-phase with no args from /Users/saharbarak (no .planning). Confirmed target is /Users/saharbarak/ceh-prep per auto-memory. Plan-phase detected phase 4 as next unplanned, created directory, then paused at the CONTEXT.md gate because nesting AskUserQuestion into /gsd:discuss-phase is broken (issue #1009). In parallel the user asked to run the app and demo the logged-in dashboard, which required bringing docker mongo up and seeding a user directly (no pre-existing dev account despite the user's recollection). Dashboard renders correctly for the seeded pro/admin account (confirmed via curl + cookie). All phase 4 planning state is preserved in this handoff and HANDOFF.json.
